changelog: New standalone Hebrew-subtitles OSD button (id 6010) in VideoOSD, like Estuary's: a dedicated circle button (closed-captioning icon + gold 'עברית' label) between the subtitle-settings and video-settings buttons that opens the MasterKodi AI Subs window directly (RunScript service.subtitles.gearsai,sub_window). The in-list button in Custom_1147 (id 6009) is kept as well. VideoOSD.xml is therefore overlaid again (it was dropped in 1.0.8 as 3.2.13-native).
